run.name: Test x86-64

head_commit.message:
Add regression test for `SIGTRAP` on `int3` and single-step

Verify that `CpuException::BreakPoint` is delivered as
`SIGTRAP` with `si_code == TRAP_BRKPT`, and `CpuException::Debug`
(via the x86 Trap Flag) is delivered as `SIGTRAP` with
`si_code == TRAP_TRACE`.

Signed-off-by: Chao Liu <chao.liu.zevorn@gmail.com>

run.display_title: Map `Debug` and `BreakPoint` exceptions to `SIGTRAP` on x86

run.name: Test x86-64

head_commit.message:
Add regression test for `O_PATH` notification suppression

Verify that opening a file with `O_PATH` does not generate inotify
events (`IN_OPEN` / `IN_CLOSE_NOWRITE`), matching the Linux behavior
where `FMODE_NONOTIFY` is set on `O_PATH` file descriptors. A sanity
check confirms that normal opens still produce events.

Signed-off-by: Zhenchen Wang <m202372036@hust.edu.cn>
Signed-off-by: Zhihang Shao <dio_ro@outlook.com>

run.display_title: Add `FsNotifyMode` and suppress notifications for `O_PATH` fds
